name: Crochet
description: Fabric creation using a single hook to interlock loops of yarn

name: Knitting
description: Fabric creation using two or more needles to interlock loops of yarn

name: Tunisian Crochet
description: A hybrid technique using an elongated hook that combines elements of crochet and knitting

name: Weaving
description: Fabric creation by interlacing warp and weft threads on a loom

name: Embroidery
description: Decorative stitching applied to existing fabric using a needle and thread or yarn

name: Tatting
description: Lace-making technique using knots and loops formed with a shuttle or needle

name: Macramé
description: Textile creation using knotting rather than weaving or knitting

name: General / Cross-Craft
description: Terms, tools, and materials used across multiple yarn craft disciplines
